title: Mouse Extermination in Franklin Square | $350-$600
metaDescription: Professional mouse extermination services in Franklin Square, Long Island. Trusted local experts. Fair pricing $350-$600. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Franklin Square homeowners and businesses know that mice can quickly become a serious problem in our Long Island community. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive mouse extermination services throughout Franklin Square, from the Garden City border to the Elmont neighborhoods. Our experienced technicians deliver fast, effective rodent control with pricing between $350-$600 depending on the severity of your infestation.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Franklin Square residents for years with reliable, same-day mouse extermination services. Our locally-based team understands the unique pest pressures facing Long Island homes and uses proven methods to eliminate mice and prevent future infestations with transparent pricing and guaranteed results.
localContext: Franklin Square's mix of post-war homes, garden apartments near Franklin Avenue, and businesses along Hempstead Turnpike all face seasonal mouse activity, especially as temperatures drop. The area's established neighborhoods and proximity to commercial districts create ideal conditions for rodents seeking shelter and food sources.

faqs.question: How much does mouse extermination cost in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: Mouse extermination in Franklin Square typically costs between $350-$600 depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and number of entry points requiring sealing. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a mouse problem in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Franklin Square residents. Once you call, we can typically have a technician at your Long Island property within 24 hours to assess the situation and begin treatment immediately.

faqs.question: What does your mouse extermination service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection, strategic trap placement, rodent-proofing entry points, removal of contaminated materials, sanitization of affected areas, and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination. We also provide prevention recommendations to keep mice out permanently.

faqs.question: Are your mouse control methods safe for families and pets in Franklin Square homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we prioritize safety while delivering effective results. Our technicians use EPA-approved products and employ targeted treatment methods that protect your family and pets. We clearly explain all procedures and safety precautions during our service visit.
